title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Eval Recall
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.
Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for prompt claude practice that tests this competency: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Claude Code Context trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for provide claude code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.

content.text: For Claude Code Context, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

stimulus.title: Claude Code Context case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for prompt claude practice that tests this competency: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Claude Code needs only a feature request to modify any repository safely.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context. Artifact under review: a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite.

options.text: The Claude Code Context record says a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Claude Code Context without its stated preconditions, omit the a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Claude Code Context for a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite.
The record names the assumption, applies Claude Code Context, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
